# Cathedral

Agent-facing Cathedral cloud ops bundle for coding agents.

Install the local skills bundle:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://basilica.ai/agents/install.sh | bash
```

Primary resources:

- Full bundle: `https://basilica.ai/llms-full.txt`
- Cloud ops playbook: `https://basilica.ai/agents/cloud-ops.md`
- Repo agent guide: `https://basilica.ai/agents/AGENTS.md`
- Installer: `https://basilica.ai/agents/install.sh`

Skill files:

- `https://basilica.ai/agents/cathedral-cloud-operator/SKILL.md`
- `https://basilica.ai/agents/cathedral-account-ops/SKILL.md`
- `https://basilica.ai/agents/cathedral-rentals-ops/SKILL.md`
- `https://basilica.ai/agents/cathedral-serverless-ops/SKILL.md`
- `https://basilica.ai/agents/cathedral-sdk-ops/SKILL.md`
